mapper.select: SELECT s.selection_id AS selectionId, s.topic_id AS topicId, t.topic_title AS topicTitle, t.topic_category AS topicCategory, CASE t.topic_category WHEN 1 THEN '高职升本' WHEN 2 THEN '3+1' WHEN 3 THEN '实验班' ELSE '未知' END AS topicCategoryDesc, e.enterprise_name AS enterpriseName, t.guidance_direction AS guidanceDirection, u.real_name AS creatorName, s.selection_reason AS selectionReason, s.selection_status AS selectionStatus, CASE s.selection_status WHEN 0 THEN '待确认' WHEN 1 THEN '中选' WHEN 2 THEN '落选' ELSE '未知' END AS selectionStatusDesc, DATE_FORMAT(s.apply_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS applyTime, DATE_FORMAT(s.confirm_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS confirmTime FROM topic_selection s INNER JOIN topic_info t ON s.topic_id = t.topic_id LEFT JOIN enterprise_info e ON t.enterprise_id = e.enterprise_id LEFT JOIN user_info u ON t.creator_id = u.user_id WHERE s.deleted = 0 AND s.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY s.apply_time DESC
